author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 3aa70cc. Measured: default run on 64MiB corpus 4.62s -> 2.25s (-q: 1.54s; sed ~1.0s). Print cap 50 hunks/file + summary line; context_lines=0 threaded for -q/-c with engine emitting None (no empty-Vec allocs); encode() -> Cow kills the UTF-8 write copy; uses_crlf fused to one pass. 25 suites green, clippy/fmt clean. Remaining gap = per-line String materialization + Change construction -> #109 splice path next.
